domain: Multi-platform SaaS billing and subscription management. A growth-stage analytics company (Verida Analytics) that simultaneously uses 8 billing platforms across different customer segments and geographies. Core business: B2B analytics SaaS with starter, pro, and enterprise tiers.

personas.name: growth-saas
personas.description: Verida Analytics — a growth-stage B2B SaaS company with approximately £127k MRR across 8 billing platforms. Core web subscriptions via Stripe (£77k, ~61% of MRR) for 1,200 customers on starter (£29/mo), pro (£79/mo), and enterprise (£499/mo) plans. EU and international customers billed via Paddle (£28k, ~22% of MRR) with strong German localisation driving +31% MoM EU growth. Mobile app subscriptions via RevenueCat (£15k, ~12% of MRR) — currently down ~23% this week due to Apple App Store outage on Tuesday. Enterprise invoicing and contract management via Chargebee (£6k, ~5% of MRR) with 3 overdue invoices totalling £12,400 (oldest is 34 days overdue). UK SMB customers on direct debit via GoCardless — £8,400 collected on Monday pending 2-day bank settlement (clears Thursday). Individual developer and indie licenses via Lemon Squeezy (534 license holders). Large enterprise usage-based contracts via Zuora (3 contracts, usage-based billing). Legacy subscriber management via Recurly (47 long-term subscribers migrated from old platform). Total ~2,847 paying customers. 8.2% MoM revenue growth. 6 months of billing history showing healthy growth trend. Also has 847 free-tier users in the product database, some repeatedly hitting API rate limits (conversion opportunity). 14 Pro customers who haven't logged in for 30+ days (churn risk). 34 users in the database with paid plan flags but no corresponding billing platform record (data integrity issue).

scenarios.name: hello-smoke
scenarios.goal: Verify the agent returns valid JSON for a trivial greeting

scenarios.name: capabilities-smoke
scenarios.goal: Verify the agent can describe its billing analysis coverage
scenarios.input: List the billing platforms and product database you can analyze.
